title: Planning Item
description: A task, milestone, or deliverable for the Gantt planning view.

type.description: task = duration bar; milestone = diamond; deliverable = circle.

name.description: Short label shown on the chart.

description.description: Longer explanation shown in hover tooltip.

date.description: Point-in-time date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required for milestones and deliverables.

predecessors.description: IDs of items that must finish before this one starts.

color.description: Optional CSS color override for this item.

row.description: Row index (0-based). Items with the same row share one lane.

group.description: Optional group name; items in the same group are placed on one row.

row_label.description: Optional label for the left column when multiple items share a row.

anchor.description: Optional item id; render on that item's row instead of a dedicated row.
